title: Avoid using Math.abs and negation on numbers that could be MIN_VALUE
description: This rule involves the use of Math.abs and negation on numbers that could be MIN_VALUE. It is a problem because it can lead to incorrect results and unexpected behavior in the program.
recommendation: Use the absExact() method instead of Math.abs and negation.
impact: Incorrect results and unexpected behavior in the program

checks.message: Use the absExact() method instead of Math.abs and negation.
